groups.title: Uzum registration & store opening
groups.intro: Photos and infographics are not part of the package and are billed per pricelist. A single card can have up to 10 SKUs.

packages.title: Registration & store opening
packages.bonus: Store text and visual design — included as a gift.

packages.title: Package: registration + 5 cards
packages.description: Includes: account registration, store creation, 5 product cards.
packages.bonus: Store text and visual design — included as a gift.

packages.title: Package: registration + 10 cards
packages.description: Includes: account registration, store creation, 10 product cards.
packages.bonus: Store text and visual design — included as a gift.

packages.title: Ad-campaign setup and management
packages.description: Duration: from 1 week up to 3 months of management.

packages.title: Managed shops on Uzum, Wildberries, and Yandex Market
packages.description: For manufacturers, distributors, and large importers. Terms depend on the product category.
